ModDescription: Adds unlimited, near-free purchases at Siero's Knickknack Shack: Silver Dalia Badge (1 common crystal), Gold Dalia Badge (1 silver badge), Gold Spellbook (1 gold badge). GBFR shops can't charge rupies and free items get a ~200 cap, so a trivial 1:1 material cost is used to make them unlimited. Built for Endless Ragnarok 2.0.
